task_summary: Panel cohort cell: p3_marketingops asks composer to build the boolean_routing pipeline shape. Generated from panel-broad-2026-05-09.yaml on the panel-broad cohort.
opening_prompt: I've got a CSV with leads — id, message, and an approved flag. I need to set this up so it triggers when I load the file, then auto-route based on the approval status. Split the approved ones into one output file and the rejected ones into another. Think of it like a Zapier filter action, but I want both branches to write their own CSVs. Set up the automation to handle validation errors by just discarding bad rows. Can you wire this up so the field mapping stays clean and I don't lose data on write failures either?

build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Lower-case substring match against final assistant content. The skill (anti-passivity section) explicitly forbids these phrases — any hit is RED. Standard list shared with the convergence suite.
red_criteria.build_failure_note: These strings are server-injected by service.py:_build_runtime_preflight_message() when the model declares completion but the pipeline fails preflight. Their presence is definitive evidence the model failed to converge.
